zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Senlis於大約1140年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾時，她的父親Lord Saher de Quincy51歲，母親Matilda de Senlis51歲。她於1160年之前與Roger de Huntingfield Lord of East Bradenham在英國素福爾可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1204年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾福藍普頓享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Senlis于大约1140年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾时，她的父亲Lord Saher de Quincy51岁，母亲Matilda de Senlis51岁。她于1160年之前与Roger de Huntingfield Lord of East Bradenham在英国素福爾可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1204年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾福藍普頓享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Senlis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Sales
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Efren, Alberto, Francisco, Manuel, Camilo, Carlos, Fernando, Juan, Juanita, Mario, Ofelia.

English: variant of Sale with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s. The Middle English plural form was probably often in variation with the singular form. The surname is uncommon in southwestern England but may derive there from Zeals (Wiltshire), and also from the plural form of Old English sealh ‘willow’; see Seal .
Catalan, Spanish, and French (Occitan): habitational name from any of the places called Sales, like Sales de Llierca (Catalonia), from the plural of   Sala   1. Compare   De Sales  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Senlis was born about 1140, in Leicestershire, England, her father, Lord Saher de Quincy, was 51 and her mother, Matilda de Senlis, was 51. She married Roger de Huntingfield Lord of East Bradenham before 1160, in Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1204, in Frampton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Senlis est née environ 1140, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Lord Saher de Quincy, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Senlis, avait 51 ans. Elle a épousé Roger de Huntingfield Lord of East Bradenham avant 1160, à Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1204, à Frampton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Senlis um 1140 in Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord Saher de Quincy 51 und ihre Mutter Matilda de Senlis 51. Sie hat vor 1160 in Suffolk, England Roger de Huntingfield Lord of East Bradenham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1204 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Frampton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Senlis è nata il circa 1140 nel Leicestershire, England, sua padre, Lord Saher de Quincy, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Matilda de Senlis, aveva 51 anni. Lei sposato Roger de Huntingfield Lord of East Bradenham prima del 1160, nel Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1204, nel Frampton, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Senlisが約1140年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Lord Saher de Quincyは51歳，母Matilda de Senlisは51歳であった。1160年以前にイギリススフォルクでRoger de Huntingfield Lord of East Bradenhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1204年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアフランプトンで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Senlis(이)가 대략 1140년 영국 레이스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord Saher de Quincy(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda de Senlis(은)는 51세였다. 그녀는 1160년 이전 영국 수폴크에서 Roger de Huntingfield Lord of East Bradenham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1204년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 프램프턴에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Senlis nasceu aproximadamente 1140, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Saher de Quincy, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Matilda de Senlis, tinha 51 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger de Huntingfield Lord of East Bradenham antes 1160, em Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1204, em Frampton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Senlis родилась около 1140 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Lord Saher de Quincy было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Senlis, 51. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger de Huntingfield Lord of East Bradenham перед 1160 г. в местности суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1204 г. в местности фрамптон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Senlis nació aproximadamente 1140, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord Saher de Quincy, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Matilda de Senlis, tenía 51 años. Se casó con Roger de Huntingfield Lord of East Bradenham antes de 1160, en Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1204, en Frampton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años.
